photo.credit: NASA · Apollo 13 (Apr 1970) — the lunar module Aquarius after splashdown, showing the makeshift "mailbox" CO₂ scrubber adapter. Apollo 13's hybrid trajectory was reverted to a free-return after the O₂ tank failure.

see_in_app.context_key: Orrery's default ORRERY-1 scenario is a Mars free-return flyby
Apollo 8/13 used cislunar free-return for safety
